title: limonium compactum
intro: Limonium compactum, also known as compact sea lavender, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small, blue-purple flowers and silvery-gray foliage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of limonium compactum include its ability to promote relaxation, reduce anxiety, and support respiratory health due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of limonium compactum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
